risk: Qwen3.5 9B failed strict JSON parsing under the first structured-output probe
mitigation: Benchmark Gemma 4 12B and Qwen3.6 27B with the fixed contract before model selection
notes: No downstream repair or prompt retry allowed

risk: The disposable LM Studio spike script and test exceed the repository decomposition guideline
mitigation: Keep spike code outside production imports and design the provider adapter as smaller contract-bound modules
notes: The disposable spike was removed in W-039; ADR 0002 retains the evidence and any future provider work starts from a production contract

risk: Current executable BookmarkCatalog methods cannot return typed persistence failures
mitigation: Apply the accepted architecture contract in Slice 12 before service or SQLite implementation
notes: Executable types now distinguish validation storage and missing data

risk: Jobs contract has no distinct stored-queue-corruption failure code
mitigation: Map impossible stored invariants to storage_unavailable and add a code only if operational evidence makes the distinction useful
notes: ADR 0007 records this deliberate first-horizon limitation

risk: Progress currently validates and materializes every requested-batch job row
mitigation: Measure progress polling cost with the first UI and replace with validated SQL aggregates only if the 10000-node workload misses its responsiveness budget
notes: Current 10000-node target makes the simpler strongly validated projection acceptable

risk: Health fixture tests require permission to bind ephemeral loopback listeners
mitigation: Keep the test command local-only and document the permission requirement in ADR 0008
notes: Restricted sandboxes return EPERM while approved local execution passes

risk: Special-purpose IPv6 and translated loopback targets pass request approval
mitigation: Implement and boundary-test an explicit IANA-derived IPv6 policy in remediation Slice 2
notes: TDD-055 and TDD-064 plus VER-608 and VER-613 prove fail-closed special reserved translated and deprecated-local IPv6 handling

risk: Slow response activity can extend a Health transport beyond its declared total deadline
mitigation: Add one absolute elapsed timer and a slow-drip regression in remediation Slice 1
notes: TDD-054 and VER-544 prove one absolute deadline across resolution headers and the complete response body

risk: SQLite databases containing bookmark titles and URLs are created with group and other read access
mitigation: Create and tighten file-backed databases to POSIX mode 0600 in remediation Slice 3
notes: TDD-056 proves both public SQLite openers create and tighten regular database files to POSIX mode 0600

risk: The declared typecheck omits most production files and hides 30 strict compiler errors
mitigation: Repair errors in Slices 4 and 5 then expand the permanent gate in Slice 6
notes: TDD-057 through TDD-059 and VER-612 prove strict all-source typechecking deterministic test discovery and the aggregate gate

risk: Production DNS and common certificate failures map to unsupported or unknown outcomes
mitigation: Map structured Node error codes without prose parsing in remediation Slice 7
notes: TDD-060 and VER-584 prove explicit structured DNS X509 connection parser protocol and unknown mappings

risk: Health accepts repository observations after checking only four identity fields
mitigation: Add a Health-owned full observation validator in remediation Slice 8
notes: TDD-061 and TDD-065 prove complete repository-result validation and exact requested-URL identity on load and save

risk: The CLI traverses Catalog snapshots and owns descendant-count projection
mitigation: Add a Catalog inspection contract then migrate the CLI in remediation Slices 9 and 10
notes: TDD-062 and TDD-063 plus VER-603 prove Catalog-owned projection with byte-compatible private CLI formatting

risk: Recursive bookmark paths have no shared depth node or byte budget
mitigation: Plan a public resource boundary then migrate parser Catalog storage and Processing paths
notes: TDD-067 through TDD-072 and VER-633 through VER-655 prove shared byte node and depth limits plus iterative Catalog Chrome HTML SQLite inspection CLI and Processing paths

risk: Test enrollment and public-module import rules rely on manual maintenance
mitigation: Add deterministic test discovery and an AST boundary contract test in remediation Slice 6
notes: TDD-059 and VER-606 prove deterministic enrollment and public-module AST enforcement; the import-equals blind spot is tracked by follow-up Slice 14

risk: Completed active plans and superseded ADR and risk text present stale repository state
mitigation: Archive and supersede records after the underlying repairs establish corrected facts
notes: W-114 archived eight completed plans closed repaired risks and linked retained transport evidence to current production proofs
